prompt: Design a screenshot of an English learning app quiz, using the quiz layout from the first image and the vocabulary image test from the second image.
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of an English learning app quiz. Use the overall mobile app UI layout and design elements from image 1. Replace the large image of strawberries in image 1 with the image of bananas from image 2. In the multiple-choice section below the image, include 'banana' as the correct option, displayed in the same green, selected style as 'strawberry' in image 1. For the other options, include plausible fruit-related vocabulary, mimicking the style of the radio buttons and text from image 1. Ensure the top status bar, the header ('Image Test - Fruit I'), and the bottom navigation buttons ('Wrong (1)', 'Next Word (3/13)', 'Correct (2)') are maintained as presented in image 1.
objects: Header 'Image Test - Fruit I' with back arrow
Multiple-choice options with other fruit vocabulary (unselected style)
Image of strawberries (should not be present)
